$ Bash
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add donation form modal with Turbo Frame, Stimulus controllers, and Hebrew validation

Implements the donation modal (DonationsController, modal/form Stimulus
controllers, partials for amount/frequency/donor/display-preference/dedication),
fixes slug-based routing via Campaign#to_param, breaks out of the Turbo Frame
on successful submission via turbo:submit-end + Turbo.visit, adds Hebrew
locale for ActiveRecord validation messages, renders flash notices in the
layout, fixes the featured-badge pointer-events bug, and seeds larger
donations bringing the campaign to ~33% of its goal.
EOF
)" && git push

<div dir="rtl" class="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
  <div class="rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow">
    <img src="<%= @campaign.cover_image_url %>" alt="<%= @campaign.title %>" class="w-full h-64 object-cover">

    <div class="bg-white p-6">
      <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900"><%= @campaign.title %></h1>

      <div class="mt-6">
        <div class="flex items-baseline justify-between text-sm text-gray-600">
          <span class="text-2xl font-bold text-orange-600">
            <%= number_to_currency(@campaign.raised_amount, unit: "₪", format: "%n %u") %> גויסו
          </span>
          <span>יעד: <%= number_to_currency(@campaign.goal_amount, unit: "₪", format: "%n %u") %></span>
        </div>

        <div class="mt-2 h-3 w-full rounded-full bg-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
          <div class="h-full bg-orange-500" style="width: <%= [ @campaign.progress_percentage, 100 ].min %>%"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="mt-2 flex items-center justify-between text-sm text-gray-500">
          <span><%= @campaign.progress_percentage %>% גויסו</span>
          <span>מספר תורמים: <%= @campaign.donations.distinct.count(:donor_email) %></span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="mt-6" data-controller="modal">
        <button type="button"
                data-action="modal#open"
                data-modal-src-param="<%= new_campaign_donation_path(@campaign) %>"
                class="px-6 py-3 rounded-md bg-orange-500 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-orange-600">
          לתרומה
        </button>

        <dialog data-modal-target="dialog"
                data-action="click->modal#closeBackground"
                class="w-full max-w-lg rounded-lg p-0 backdrop:bg-black/50">
          <%= turbo_frame_tag "donation_modal", data: { modal_target: "frame" } %>
        </dialog>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <% tabs = [
       { name: "about_project", label: "על הפרויקט" },
       { name: "recent_donations", label: "תרומות אחרונות" },
       { name: "ambassador_board", label: "לוח שגרירים" },
       { name: "groups", label: "קבוצות" },
       { name: "about_charity", label: "על העמותה" },
       { name: "updates", label: "עדכונים" }
     ] %>

  <div data-controller="tabs" class="mt-8 bg-white rounded-lg shadow">
    <div class="flex flex-wrap border-b border-gray-200">
      <% tabs.each do |tab| %>
        <button
          type="button"
          data-tabs-target="tab"
          data-tabs-name-param="<%= tab[:name] %>"
          data-action="tabs#select"
          class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-gray-500 border-b-2 border-transparent hover:text-orange-600 [&.tabs-active]:text-orange-600 [&.tabs-active]:border-orange-500"
        >
          <%= tab[:label] %>
        </button>
      <% end %>
    </div>

    <div class="p-6">
      <div data-tabs-target="panel" data-tabs-name-param="about_project">
        <p class="whitespace-pre-line text-gray-700 leading-relaxed"><%= @campaign.story %></p>
      </div>

      <div data-tabs-target="panel" data-tabs-name-param="recent_donations" hidden>
        <p class="text-gray-500">רשימת התרומות האחרונות תוצג כאן בקרוב.</p>
      </div>

      <div data-tabs-target="panel" data-tabs-name-param="ambassador_board" hidden>
        <p class="text-gray-500">לוח השגרירים בקרוב.</p>
      </div>

      <div data-tabs-target="panel" data-tabs-name-param="groups" hidden>
        <p class="text-gray-500">קבוצות בקרוב.</p>
      </div>

      <div data-tabs-target="panel" data-tabs-name-param="about_charity" hidden>
        <p class="text-gray-500">מידע על העמותה בקרוב.</p>
      </div>

      <div data-tabs-target="panel" data-tabs-name-param="updates" hidden>
        <p class="text-gray-500">עדכונים בקרוב.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Tool reply2026-06-08T11:23:59.109Z
class Donation < ApplicationRecord
  belongs_to :campaign

  enum :frequency, { one_time: 0, monthly: 1 }
  enum :status, { pending: 0, paid: 1, cancelled: 2 }
  enum :display_preference, { full_name: 0, first_name: 1, anonymous: 2 }

  validates :amount, :donor_name, :donor_email, presence: true
  validates :amount, numericality: { greater_than: 0 }
  validates :donor_email, format: { with: URI::MailTo::EMAIL_REGEXP }
end
class Campaign < ApplicationRecord
  has_many :donation_options, dependent: :destroy
  has_many :donations, dependent: :destroy

  validates :title, :story, :goal_amount, :slug, presence: true
  validates :slug, uniqueness: true
  validates :goal_amount, numericality: { greater_than: 0 }

  # Makes url helpers (campaign_path(campaign), new_campaign_donation_path(campaign), ...)
  # build slug-based URLs instead of falling back to the numeric id.
  def to_param
    slug
  end

  # Pending donations count toward progress: this demo has no payment
  # integration to ever flip them to "paid", so excluding pending would mean
  # the progress bar never visibly moves after a donation is submitted.
  # See README for the full rationale.
  def raised_amount
    donations.where(status: [ :pending, :paid ]).sum(:amount)
  end

  def progress_percentage
    return 0 if goal_amount.zero?

    (raised_amount / goal_amount * 100).round(1)
  end
end
---controller---
class DonationsController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_campaign

  def new
    @donation = @campaign.donations.build
  end

  def create
    @donation = @campaign.donations.build(donation_params)
    @donation.status = :pending

    if @donation.save
      redirect_to campaign_path(@campaign), notice: "תודה! התרומה שלך התקבלה והיא ממתינה לאישור."
    else
      render :new, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def set_campaign
    @campaign = Campaign.find_by!(slug: params[:campaign_slug])
  end

  def donation_params
    params.require(:donation)
          .permit(:amount, :custom_amount, :frequency, :donor_name, :donor_email,
                  :display_preference, :dedication_message)
          .then { |attrs| resolve_amount(attrs) }
  end

  # The form offers preset amount tiles plus a free-form "other amount" field;
  # whichever one the donor actually filled in becomes the donation amount.
  def resolve_amount(attrs)
    custom_amount = attrs.delete(:custom_amount)
    attrs[:amount] = custom_amount if custom_amount.present?
    attrs
  end
end
---routes---
  # Render dynamic PWA files from app/views/pwa/* (remember to link manifest in application.html.erb)
  # get "manifest" => "rails/pwa#manifest", as: :pwa_manifest
  # get "service-worker" => "rails/pwa#service_worker", as: :pwa_service_worker

  resources :campaigns, only: [ :show ], param: :slug do
    resources :donations, only: [ :new, :create ]
  end

  # Defines the root path route ("/")
  root "home#index"
end

# Hotwire's SPA-like page accelerator [https://turbo.hotwired.dev]
gem "turbo-rails"
---donation factory---
FactoryBot.define do
  factory :donation do
    campaign
    amount { 100 }
    frequency { :one_time }
    status { :pending }
    donor_name { "Yosef Shachnovsky" }
    sequence(:donor_email) { |n| "donor#{n}@example.com" }
    display_preference { :full_name }
    dedication_message { nil }
  end
end

---cable---
# Async adapter only works within the same process, so for manually triggering cable updates from a console,
# and seeing results in the browser, you must do so from the web console (running inside the dev process),
# not a terminal started via bin/rails console! Add "console" to any action or any ERB template view
# to make the web console appear.
development:
  adapter: async

test:
  adapter: test

production:
  adapter: solid_cable
  connects_to:
    database:
      writing: cable
  polling_interval: 0.1.seconds
  message_retention: 1.day
1:# Async adapter only works within the same process, so for manually triggering cable updates from a console,
6:  adapter: async
9:  adapter: test
12:  adapter: solid_cable
---env test---

Tool reply2026-06-08T11:26:32.265Z
module Turbo
  module Broadcastable
    module TestHelper
      extend ActiveSupport::Concern

      included do
        include ActionCable::TestHelper

        include Turbo::Streams::StreamName
      end

      # Asserts that `<turbo-stream>` elements were broadcast over Action Cable
      #
      # ==== Arguments
      #
      # * <tt>stream_name_or_object</tt> the objects used to generate the
      #   channel Action Cable name, or the name itself
      # * <tt>&block</tt> optional block executed before the
      #   assertion
      #
      # ==== Options
      #
      # * <tt>count:</tt> the number of `<turbo-stream>` elements that are
      # expected to be broadcast
      #
      # Asserts `<turbo-stream>` elements were broadcast:
      #
      #     message = Message.find(1)
      #     message.broadcast_replace_to "messages"
      #
      #     assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts "messages"
      #
      # Asserts that two `<turbo-stream>` elements were broadcast:
      #
      #     message = Message.find(1)
      #     message.broadcast_replace_to "messages"
      #     message.broadcast_remove_to "messages"
      #
      #     assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts "messages", count: 2
      #
      # You can pass a block to run before the assertion:
      #
      #     message = Message.find(1)
      #
      #     assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts "messages" do
      #       message.broadcast_append_to "messages"
      #     end
      #
      # In addition to a String, the helper also accepts an Object or Array to
      # determine the name of the channel the elements are broadcast to:
      #
      #     message = Message.find(1)
      #
      #     assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts message do
      #       message.broadcast_replace
      #     end
      #
      def assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts(stream_name_or_object, count: nil, &block)
        payloads = capture_turbo_stream_broadcasts(stream_name_or_object, &block)
        stream_name = stream_name_from(stream_name_or_object)

        if count.nil?
          assert_not_empty payloads, "Expected at least one broadcast on #{stream_name.inspect}, but there were none"
        else
          broadcasts = "Turbo Stream broadcast".pluralize(count)

          assert count == payloads.count, "Expected #{count} #{broadcasts} on #{stream_name.inspect}, but there were #{payloads.count}"
        end
      end

      # Asserts that no `<turbo-stream>` elements were broadcast over Action Cable
      #
      # ==== Arguments
      #
      # * <tt>stream_name_or_object</tt> the objects used to generate the
      #   channel Action Cable name, or the name itself
      # * <tt>&block</tt> optional block executed before the
      #   assertion
      #
      # Asserts that no `<turbo-stream>` elements were broadcast:
      #
      #     message = Message.find(1)
      #     message.broadcast_replace_to "messages"
      #
      #     assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts "messages" # fails with MiniTest::Assertion error
      #
      # You can pass a block to run before the assertion:
      #
      #     message = Message.find(1)
      #
      #     assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts "messages" do
      #       # do something other than broadcast to "messages"
      #     end
      #
      # In addition to a String, the helper also accepts an Object or Array to
      # determine the name of the channel the elements are broadcast to:
      #
      #     message = Message.find(1)
      #
      #     assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts message do
      #       # do something other than broadcast to "message_1"
      #     end
      #
      def assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts(stream_name_or_object, &block)
        block&.call

        stream_name = stream_name_from(stream_name_or_object)

        payloads = broadcasts(stream_name)

        assert payloads.empty?, "Expected no broadcasts on #{stream_name.inspect}, but there were #{payloads.count}"
      end

      # Captures any `<turbo-stream>` elements that were broadcast over Action Cable
      #
      # ==== Arguments
      #
      # * <tt>stream_name_or_object</tt> the objects used to generate the
      #   channel Action Cable name, or the name itself
      # * <tt>&block</tt> optional block to capture broadcasts during execution
      #
      # Returns any `<turbo-stream>` elements that have been broadcast as an
      # Array of <tt>Nokogiri::XML::Element</tt> instances
      #
      #     message = Message.find(1)
      #     message.broadcast_append_to "messages"
      #     message.broadcast_prepend_to "messages"
      #
      #     turbo_streams = capture_turbo_stream_broadcasts "messages"
      #
      #     assert_equal "append", turbo_streams.first["action"]
      #     assert_equal "prepend", turbo_streams.second["action"]
      #
      # You can pass a block to limit the scope of the broadcasts being captured:
      #
      #     message = Message.find(1)
      #
      #     turbo_streams = capture_turbo_stream_broadcasts "messages" do
      #       message.broadcast_append_to "messages"
      #     end
      #
      #     assert_equal "append", turbo_streams.first["action"]
      #
      # In addition to a String, the helper also accepts an Object or Array to
      # determine the name of the channel the elements are broadcast to:
      #
      #     message = Message.find(1)
      #
      #     replace, remove = capture_turbo_stream_broadcasts message do
      #       message.broadcast_replace
      #       message.broadcast_remove
      #     end
      #
      #     assert_equal "replace", replace["action"]
      #     assert_equal "replace", remove["action"]
      #
      def capture_turbo_stream_broadcasts(stream_name_or_object, &block)
        stream_name = stream_name_from(stream_name_or_object)
        payloads = if block_given?
          new_broadcasts_from(broadcasts(stream_name), stream_name, "capture_turbo_stream_broadcasts", &block)
        else
          broadcasts(stream_name)
        end

        payloads.flat_map do |payload|
          html = ActiveSupport::JSON.decode(payload)
          document = Nokogiri::HTML5.parse(html)

          document.at("body").element_children
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
---
module Turbo
  module TestAssertions
    extend ActiveSupport::Concern

    included do
      # FIXME: Should happen in Rails at a different level
      delegate :dom_id, :dom_class, to: ActionView::RecordIdentifier
    end

    # Assert that the rendered fragment of HTML contains a `<turbo-stream>`
    # element.
    #
    # ==== Options
    #
    # * <tt>:action</tt> [String] matches the element's <tt>[action]</tt>
    #   attribute
    # * <tt>:target</tt> [String, #to_key] matches the element's
    #   <tt>[target]</tt> attribute. If the value responds to <tt>#to_key</tt>,
    #   the value will be transformed by calling <tt>dom_id</tt>
    # * <tt>:targets</tt> [String] matches the element's <tt>[targets]</tt>
    #   attribute
    # * <tt>:count</tt> [Integer] indicates how many turbo streams are expected.
    #   Defaults to <tt>1</tt>.
    #
    #   Given the following HTML fragment:
    #
    #     <turbo-stream action="remove" target="message_1"></turbo-stream>
    #
    #   The following assertion would pass:
    #
    #     assert_turbo_stream action: "remove", target: "message_1"
    #
    # You can also pass a block make assertions about the contents of the
    # element. Given the following HTML fragment:
    #
    #     <turbo-stream action="replace" target="message_1">
    #       <template>
    #         <p>Hello!</p>
    #       <template>
    #     </turbo-stream>
    #
    #   The following assertion would pass:
    #
    #     assert_turbo_stream action: "replace", target: "message_1" do
    #       assert_select "template p", text: "Hello!"
    #     end
    #
    def assert_turbo_stream(action:, target: nil, targets: nil, count: 1, &block)
      selector =  %(turbo-stream[action="#{action}"])
      selector << %([target="#{target.respond_to?(:to_key) ? dom_id(target) : target}"]) if target
      selector << %([targets="#{targets}"]) if targets
      assert_select selector, count: count, &block
    end

    # Assert that the rendered fragment of HTML does not contain a `<turbo-stream>`
    # element.
    #
    # ==== Options
    #
    # * <tt>:action</tt> [String] matches the element's <tt>[action]</tt>
    #   attribute
    # * <tt>:target</tt> [String, #to_key] matches the element's
    #   <tt>[target]</tt> attribute. If the value responds to <tt>#to_key</tt>,
    #   the value will be transformed by calling <tt>dom_id</tt>
    # * <tt>:targets</tt> [String] matches the element's <tt>[targets]</tt>
    #   attribute
    #
    #   Given the following HTML fragment:
    #
    #     <turbo-stream action="remove" target="message_1"></turbo-stream>
    #
    #   The following assertion would fail:
    #
    #     assert_no_turbo_stream action: "remove", target: "message_1"
    #
    def assert_no_turbo_stream(action:, target: nil, targets: nil)
      selector =  %(turbo-stream[action="#{action}"])
      selector << %([target="#{target.respond_to?(:to_key) ? dom_id(target) : target}"]) if target
      selector << %([targets="#{targets}"]) if targets
      assert_select selector, count: 0
    end

    # Assert that the rendered fragment of HTML contains a `<turbo-frame>`
    # element.
    #
    # ==== Arguments
    #
    # * <tt>ids</tt> [String, Array<String, ActiveRecord::Base>] matches the element's <tt>[id]</tt> attribute
    #
    # ==== Options
    #
    # * <tt>:loading</tt> [String] matches the element's <tt>[loading]</tt>
    #   attribute
    # * <tt>:src</tt> [String] matches the element's <tt>[src]</tt> attribute
    # * <tt>:target</tt> [String] matches the element's <tt>[target]</tt>
    #   attribute
    # * <tt>:count</tt> [Integer] indicates how many turbo frames are expected.
    #   Defaults to <tt>1</tt>.
    #
    #   Given the following HTML fragment:
    #
    #     <turbo-frame id="example" target="_top"></turbo-frame>
    #
    #   The following assertion would pass:
    #
    #     assert_turbo_frame id: "example", target: "_top"
    #
    # You can also pass a block make assertions about the contents of the
    # element. Given the following HTML fragment:
    #
    #     <turbo-frame id="example">
    #       <p>Hello!</p>
    #     </turbo-frame>
    #
    #   The following assertion would pass:
    #
    #     assert_turbo_frame id: "example" do
    #       assert_select "p", text: "Hello!"
    #     end
    #
    def assert_turbo_frame(*ids, loading: nil, src: nil, target: nil, count: 1, &block)
      id = ids.first.respond_to?(:to_key) ? ActionView::RecordIdentifier.dom_id(*ids) : ids.join('_')
      selector = %(turbo-frame[id="#{id}"])
      selector << %([loading="#{loading}"]) if loading
      selector << %([src="#{src}"]) if src
      selector << %([target="#{target}"]) if target
      assert_select selector, count: count, &block
    end

    # Assert that the rendered fragment of HTML does not contain a `<turbo-frame>`
    # element.
    #
    # ==== Arguments
    #
    # * <tt>ids</tt> [String, Array<String, ActiveRecord::Base>] matches the <tt>[id]</tt> attribute
    #
    # ==== Options
    #
    # * <tt>:loading</tt> [String] matches the element's <tt>[loading]</tt>
    #   attribute
    # * <tt>:src</tt> [String] matches the element's <tt>[src]</tt> attribute
    # * <tt>:target</tt> [String] matches the element's <tt>[target]</tt>
    #   attribute
    #
    #   Given the following HTML fragment:
    #
    #     <turbo-frame id="example" target="_top"></turbo-frame>
    #
    #   The following assertion would fail:
    #
    #     assert_no_turbo_frame id: "example", target: "_top"
    #
    def assert_no_turbo_frame(*ids, **options, &block)
      assert_turbo_frame(*ids, **options, count: 0, &block)
    end
  end
end

Tool reply2026-06-08T11:27:56.456Z
# frozen_string_literal: true

# :markup: markdown

module ActionCable
  # Provides helper methods for testing Action Cable broadcasting
  module TestHelper
    def before_setup # :nodoc:
      server = ActionCable.server
      test_adapter = ActionCable::SubscriptionAdapter::Test.new(server)

      @old_pubsub_adapter = server.pubsub

      server.instance_variable_set(:@pubsub, test_adapter)
      super
    end

    def after_teardown # :nodoc:
      super
      ActionCable.server.instance_variable_set(:@pubsub, @old_pubsub_adapter)
    end

    # Asserts that the number of broadcasted messages to the stream matches the
    # given number.
    #
    #     def test_broadcasts
    #       assert_broadcasts 'messages', 0
    #       ActionCable.server.broadcast 'messages', { text: 'hello' }
    #       assert_broadcasts 'messages', 1
    #       ActionCable.server.broadcast 'messages', { text: 'world' }
    #       assert_broadcasts 'messages', 2
    #     end
    #
    # If a block is passed, that block should cause the specified number of messages
    # to be broadcasted.
    #
    #     def test_broadcasts_again
    #       assert_broadcasts('messages', 1) do
    #         ActionCable.server.broadcast 'messages', { text: 'hello' }
    #       end
    #
    #       assert_broadcasts('messages', 2) do
    #         ActionCable.server.broadcast 'messages', { text: 'hi' }
    #         ActionCable.server.broadcast 'messages', { text: 'how are you?' }
    #       end
    #     end
    #
    def assert_broadcasts(stream, number, &block)
      if block_given?
        new_messages = new_broadcasts_from(broadcasts(stream), stream, "assert_broadcasts", &block)

        actual_count = new_messages.size
        assert_equal number, actual_count, "#{number} broadcasts to #{stream} expected, but #{actual_count} were sent"
      else
        actual_count = broadcasts(stream).size
        assert_equal number, actual_count, "#{number} broadcasts to #{stream} expected, but #{actual_count} were sent"
      end
    end

    # Asserts that no messages have been sent to the stream.
Assistant2026-06-08T11:28:04.154Z
Thinking
Assistant2026-06-08T11:28:05.232Z
$ Bash
sed -n '60,160p' /Users/yosefshachnovsky/.rbenv/versions/3.3.11/lib/ruby/gems/3.3.0/gems/actioncable-8.1.3/lib/action_cable/test_helper.rb
Tool reply2026-06-08T11:28:12.599Z
    # Asserts that no messages have been sent to the stream.
    #
    #     def test_no_broadcasts
    #       assert_no_broadcasts 'messages'
    #       ActionCable.server.broadcast 'messages', { text: 'hi' }
    #       assert_broadcasts 'messages', 1
    #     end
    #
    # If a block is passed, that block should not cause any message to be sent.
    #
    #     def test_broadcasts_again
    #       assert_no_broadcasts 'messages' do
    #         # No job messages should be sent from this block
    #       end
    #     end
    #
    # Note: This assertion is simply a shortcut for:
    #
    #     assert_broadcasts 'messages', 0, &block
    #
    def assert_no_broadcasts(stream, &block)
      assert_broadcasts stream, 0, &block
    end

    # Returns the messages that are broadcasted in the block.
    #
    #     def test_broadcasts
    #       messages = capture_broadcasts('messages') do
    #         ActionCable.server.broadcast 'messages', { text: 'hi' }
    #         ActionCable.server.broadcast 'messages', { text: 'how are you?' }
    #       end
    #       assert_equal 2, messages.length
    #       assert_equal({ text: 'hi' }, messages.first)
    #       assert_equal({ text: 'how are you?' }, messages.last)
    #     end
    #
    def capture_broadcasts(stream, &block)
      new_broadcasts_from(broadcasts(stream), stream, "capture_broadcasts", &block).map { |m| ActiveSupport::JSON.decode(m) }
    end

    # Asserts that the specified message has been sent to the stream.
    #
    #     def test_assert_transmitted_message
    #       ActionCable.server.broadcast 'messages', text: 'hello'
    #       assert_broadcast_on('messages', text: 'hello')
    #     end
    #
    # If a block is passed, that block should cause a message with the specified
    # data to be sent.
    #
    #     def test_assert_broadcast_on_again
    #       assert_broadcast_on('messages', text: 'hello') do
    #         ActionCable.server.broadcast 'messages', text: 'hello'
    #       end
    #     end
    #
    def assert_broadcast_on(stream, data, &block)
      # Encode to JSON and back–we want to use this value to compare with decoded
      # JSON. Comparing JSON strings doesn't work due to the order if the keys.
      serialized_msg =
        ActiveSupport::JSON.decode(ActiveSupport::JSON.encode(data))

      new_messages = broadcasts(stream)
      if block_given?
        new_messages = new_broadcasts_from(new_messages, stream, "assert_broadcast_on", &block)
      end

      message = new_messages.find { |msg| ActiveSupport::JSON.decode(msg) == serialized_msg }

      error_message = "No messages sent with #{data} to #{stream}"

      if new_messages.any?
        error_message = new_messages.inject("#{error_message}\nMessage(s) found:\n") do |error_message, new_message|
          error_message + "#{ActiveSupport::JSON.decode(new_message)}\n"
        end
      else
        error_message = "#{error_message}\nNo message found for #{stream}"
      end

      assert message, error_message
    end

    def pubsub_adapter # :nodoc:
      ActionCable.server.pubsub
    end

    delegate :broadcasts, :clear_messages, to: :pubsub_adapter

    private
      def new_broadcasts_from(current_messages, stream, assertion, &block)
        old_messages = current_messages
        clear_messages(stream)

        _assert_nothing_raised_or_warn(assertion, &block)
        new_messages = broadcasts(stream)
        clear_messages(stream)

        # Restore all sent messages
        (old_messages + new_messages).each { |m| pubsub_adapter.broadcast(stream, m) }

        new_messages

Assistant2026-06-08T11:28:31.382Z
✏️ Edit donation.rb
/Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/app/models/donation.rb
−
  validates :amount, :donor_name, :donor_email, presence: true
  validates :amount, numericality: { greater_than: 0 }
  validates :donor_email, format: { with: URI::MailTo::EMAIL_REGEXP }
end
+
  validates :amount, :donor_name, :donor_email, presence: true
  validates :amount, numericality: { greater_than: 0 }
  validates :donor_email, format: { with: URI::MailTo::EMAIL_REGEXP }

  # Resolves the donor's name for public display according to their chosen
  # `display_preference` (e.g. "Yosef S." for first-name-only, "אנונימי/ת"
  # for anonymous), so the "Recent donations" list never shows more than the
  # donor agreed to.
  def display_name
    case display_preference
    when "anonymous"
      "תורם/ת אנונימי/ת"
    when "first_name"
      first, *rest = donor_name.to_s.split
      rest.empty? ? first.to_s : "#{first} #{rest.last[0]}."
    else
      donor_name
    end
  end
end

<div id="<%= dom_id(campaign, :stats) %>" class="mt-6">
  <div class="flex items-baseline justify-between text-sm text-gray-600">
    <span class="text-2xl font-bold text-orange-600">
      <%= number_to_currency(campaign.raised_amount, unit: "₪", format: "%n %u") %> גויסו
    </span>
    <span>יעד: <%= number_to_currency(campaign.goal_amount, unit: "₪", format: "%n %u") %></span>
  </div>

  <div class="mt-2 h-3 w-full rounded-full bg-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
    <div class="h-full bg-orange-500" style="width: <%= [ campaign.progress_percentage, 100 ].min %>%"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="mt-2 flex items-center justify-between text-sm text-gray-500">
    <span><%= campaign.progress_percentage %>% גויסו</span>
    <span>מספר תורמים: <%= campaign.donations.distinct.count(:donor_email) %></span>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="<%= dom_id(donation) %>" dir="rtl" class="border-b border-gray-100 py-3 last:border-b-0">
  <div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
    <span class="font-medium text-gray-900">
      <%= donation.display_name %>
      <% if donation.monthly? %>
        <span class="me-1 inline-block rounded-full bg-orange-100 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs text-orange-700">תרומה חודשית</span>
      <% end %>
    </span>
    <span class="shrink-0 font-semibold text-orange-600">
      <%= number_to_currency(donation.amount, unit: "₪", format: "%n %u") %>
    </span>
  </div>

  <% if donation.dedication_message.present? %>
    <p class="mt-1 text-sm text-gray-500"><%= donation.dedication_message %></p>
  <% end %>
</div>

class DonationsController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_campaign

  def new
    @donation = @campaign.donations.build
  end

  def create
    @donation = @campaign.donations.build(donation_params)
    @donation.status = :pending

    if @donation.save
      redirect_to campaign_path(@campaign), notice: "תודה! התרומה שלך התקבלה והיא ממתינה לאישור."
    else
      render :new, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private
+
class DonationsController < ApplicationController
  include ActionView::RecordIdentifier

  before_action :set_campaign

  def new
    @donation = @campaign.donations.build
  end

  def create
    @donation = @campaign.donations.build(donation_params)
    @donation.status = :pending

    if @donation.save
      broadcast_campaign_updates
      redirect_to campaign_path(@campaign), notice: "תודה! התרומה שלך התקבלה והיא ממתינה לאישור."
    else
      render :new, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  # Pushes the new totals and the new donation to everyone currently viewing
  # the campaign page (via the `turbo_stream_from @campaign` subscription),
  # so the progress bar, raised amount, donor count, and "Recent donations"
  # list update live for them without a reload — the submitter's own page
  # gets there anyway via the post-redirect full-page visit.
  def broadcast_campaign_updates
    @campaign.broadcast_replace_to(@campaign,
      target: dom_id(@campaign, :stats),
      partial: "campaigns/stats",
      locals: { campaign: @campaign })

    @donation.broadcast_prepend_to(@campaign,
      target: dom_id(@campaign, :recent_donations),
      partial: "donations/donation",
      locals: { donation: @donation })
  end
Tool reply2026-06-08T11:29:11.421Z
<tool_use_error>File has not been read yet. Read it first before writing to it.</tool_use_error>

2	  before_action :set_campaign
3	
4	  def new

6	  end
7	
8	  def create
9	    @donation = @campaign.donations.build(donation_params)
10	    @donation.status = :pending
11	
12	    if @donation.save
13	      redirect_to campaign_path(@campaign), notice: "תודה! התרומה שלך התקבלה והיא ממתינה לאישור."
14	    else
15	      render :new, status: :unprocessable_entity
16	    end
17	  end
18	
19	  private
20	
21	  def set_campaign
22	    @campaign = Campaign.find_by!(slug: params[:campaign_slug])
23	  end
24	
25	  def donation_params
26	    params.require(:donation)
27	          .permit(:amount, :custom_amount, :frequency, :donor_name, :donor_email,
28	                  :display_preference, :dedication_message)
29	          .then { |attrs| resolve_amount(attrs) }
30	  end
31	
32	  # The form offers preset amount tiles plus a free-form "other amount" field;
33	  # whichever one the donor actually filled in becomes the donation amount.
34	  def resolve_amount(attrs)
35	    custom_amount = attrs.delete(:custom_amount)
36	    attrs[:amount] = custom_amount if custom_amount.present?
37	    attrs
38	  end
39	end
40

+
class DonationsController < ApplicationController
  include ActionView::RecordIdentifier

  before_action :set_campaign

  def new
    @donation = @campaign.donations.build
  end

  def create
    @donation = @campaign.donations.build(donation_params)
    @donation.status = :pending

    if @donation.save
      broadcast_campaign_updates
      redirect_to campaign_path(@campaign), notice: "תודה! התרומה שלך התקבלה והיא ממתינה לאישור."
    else
      render :new, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  # Pushes the new totals and the new donation to everyone currently viewing
  # the campaign page (via the `turbo_stream_from @campaign` subscription),
  # so the progress bar, raised amount, donor count, and "Recent donations"
  # list update live for them without a reload — the submitter's own page
  # gets there anyway via the post-redirect full-page visit.
  def broadcast_campaign_updates
    @campaign.broadcast_replace_to(@campaign,
      target: dom_id(@campaign, :stats),
      partial: "campaigns/stats",
      locals: { campaign: @campaign })

    @donation.broadcast_prepend_to(@campaign,
      target: dom_id(@campaign, :recent_donations),
      partial: "donations/donation",
      locals: { donation: @donation })
  end

  def set_campaign

require "capybara/rspec"

RSpec.configure do |config|
  config.before(:each, type: :system) do
    driven_by(:selenium, using: :headless_chrome, screen_size: [ 1400, 1400 ])
  end

Assistant2026-06-08T11:30:57.787Z
$ Bash
find /Users/yosefshachnovsky/.rbenv -path "*action_cable/subscription_adapter/test.rb" | head -1 | xargs cat
Tool reply2026-06-08T11:31:24.619Z
# frozen_string_literal: true

# :markup: markdown

module ActionCable
  module SubscriptionAdapter
    # ## Test adapter for Action Cable
    #
    # The test adapter should be used only in testing. Along with
    # ActionCable::TestHelper it makes a great tool to test your Rails application.
    #
    # To use the test adapter set `adapter` value to `test` in your
    # `config/cable.yml` file.
    #
    # NOTE: `Test` adapter extends the `ActionCable::SubscriptionAdapter::Async`
    # adapter, so it could be used in system tests too.
    class Test < Async
      def broadcast(channel, payload)
        broadcasts(channel) << payload
        super
      end

      def broadcasts(channel)
        channels_data[channel] ||= []
      end

      def clear_messages(channel)
        channels_data[channel] = []
      end

      def clear
        @channels_data = nil
      end

      private
        def channels_data
          @channels_data ||= {}
        end
    end
  end
end

cat /Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/app/views/donations/_display_preference.html.erb /Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/app/views/donations/_amount_options.html.erb
Tool reply2026-06-08T11:31:38.843Z
<div class="mb-5">
  <p class="mb-2 block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">אני רוצה שבעמוד הפרויקט יופיע:</p>

  <div class="space-y-1">
    <% { full_name: "השם המלא שלי", first_name: "השם הפרטי שלי בלבד", anonymous: "אנונימי" }.each do |value, label| %>
      <label class="flex cursor-pointer items-center gap-2">
        <%= form.radio_button :display_preference, value, checked: form.object.display_preference == value.to_s %>
        <span class="text-sm text-gray-700"><%= label %></span>
      </label>
    <% end %>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="mb-5">
  <p class="mb-2 block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">בחרו סכום לתרומה</p>

  <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-3">
    <% campaign.donation_options.order(:amount).each do |option| %>
      <label class="relative flex cursor-pointer flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-gray-300 p-3 has-[:checked]:border-orange-500 has-[:checked]:ring-2 has-[:checked]:ring-orange-200">
        <%= radio_button_tag "donation[amount]", option.amount, donation.amount == option.amount,
              data: { action: "donation-form#selectPreset" } %>
        <span class="mt-1 font-bold text-gray-900"><%= number_to_currency(option.amount, unit: "₪", format: "%n %u", precision: 0) %></span>
        <span class="text-xs text-gray-500"><%= option.label %></span>
        <% if option.featured? %>
          <span class="pointer-events-none absolute -top-2 -right-2 rounded-full bg-orange-500 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs text-white">🧡 הכי נבחר</span>
        <% end %>
      </label>
    <% end %>

    <label class="relative flex cursor-pointer flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-gray-300 p-3 has-[:checked]:border-orange-500 has-[:checked]:ring-2 has-[:checked]:ring-orange-200">
      <%= radio_button_tag "donation[amount]", "", false, id: "donation_amount_other",
            data: { action: "donation-form#selectCustom" } %>
      <span class="mt-1 font-bold text-gray-900">סכום אחר</span>
    </label>
  </div>

  <div class="mt-3" data-donation-form-target="customAmountWrapper" hidden>
    <%= label_tag "donation_custom_amount", "סכום בש״ח", class: "mb-1 block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700" %>
    <%= number_field_tag "donation[custom_amount]", nil, min: 1, step: "0.01", placeholder: "לדוגמה 250",
          class: "w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-orange-500",
          data: { donation_form_target: "customAmountInput" } %>
  </div>
</div>

Assistant2026-06-08T11:32:02.306Z
📝 Write live_campaign_updates_spec.rb
/Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/spec/system/live_campaign_updates_spec.rb
require "rails_helper"

RSpec.describe "Live campaign updates via Turbo Streams", type: :system do
  let(:campaign) { create(:campaign, goal_amount: 10_000) }
  let!(:option) { create(:donation_option, campaign: campaign, amount: 250, label: "תרומה רגילה") }

  it "broadcasts the new totals and donation to other viewers without a reload" do
    using_session("viewer") do
      visit campaign_path(campaign.slug)
      click_button "תרומות אחרונות"
      expect(page).to have_content("עדיין אין תרומות להצגה")
    end

    using_session("donor") do
      visit campaign_path(campaign.slug)
      click_button "לתרומה"

      within "dialog" do
        choose "250 ₪ תרומה רגילה"
        fill_in "שם מלא", with: "רותם לוי כהן"
        fill_in "אימייל", with: "rotem@example.com"
        choose "השם הפרטי שלי בלבד"
        click_button "המשך לתרומה"
      end

      expect(page).to have_content("תודה!")
    end

    using_session("viewer") do
      expect(page).to have_content("250.00 ₪ גויסו")
      expect(page).to have_content("רותם ל.")
      expect(page).to have_no_content("עדיין אין תרומות להצגה")
    end
  end
end

    @donation.broadcast_prepend_to(@campaign,
      target: dom_id(@campaign, :recent_donations),
      partial: "donations/donation",
      locals: { donation: @donation })

    # Removes the "no donations yet" placeholder once the first one lands.
    @campaign.broadcast_remove_to(@campaign, target: dom_id(@campaign, :no_donations))
  end

Assistant2026-06-08T11:43:18.069Z

Puma is the Ruby web server that Rails uses (bin/rails server boots it). I started an instance earlier on port 3099 to manually inspect the rendered HTML of the campaign page (checking that the "Recent donations" partial and display_name resolution worked). The pkill -f "puma 8.0.2" was meant to stop that ad-hoc dev server I launched for inspection — not anything you were running yourself, and not anything related to deployment (Render runs its own Puma instance in production, untouched by this).

That said, I should double check — was that server already running before I started poking at it, or did I launch it?

Checking the timestamp (started 2:11 PM, bound to port 3099 — not the 3010 I requested), this is most likely your own dev server that was already running before I touched anything (probably left over from earlier Playwright testing in this session) — not one I started. I won't kill it.

Apologies for the careless pkill — I should have checked whether it was pre-existing before suggesting to stop it.

Assistant2026-06-08T11:43:59.379Z
✏️ Edit TASKS.md
/Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/docs/TASKS.md
−
## 7. Donation creation & live progress update
- [ ] `DonationsController#create`: build the Donation in `pending` status, associate to its Campaign, persist
- [ ] On success: close the modal, show a brief "thank you — your donation is pending" message, and broadcast a Turbo Stream updating the raised-amount, progress bar, and donor count in place (no full reload) — this is the part that makes the brief's "submitting updates the campaign's progress" requirement directly observable
- [ ] "Recent donations" list: donor name resolved per `display_preference` (e.g. "Yosef S." for first-name-only, "Anonymous" for anonymous), amount, dedication message when present, recurring badge — appended live via Turbo Stream when a new donation lands
- [ ] **Tests**: request/system spec — submitting the donation form creates a `pending` Donation, the campaign's raised amount/progress visibly increases, and the new donation appears in the "Recent donations" list with the name rendered per its `display_preference`
- [ ] Commit + push
+
## 7. Donation creation & live progress update
- [x] `DonationsController#create`: build the Donation in `pending` status, associate to its Campaign, persist
- [x] On success: close the modal, show a brief "thank you — your donation is pending" message, and broadcast a Turbo Stream updating the raised-amount, progress bar, and donor count in place (no full reload) — this is the part that makes the brief's "submitting updates the campaign's progress" requirement directly observable (extracted `campaigns/_stats` partial, subscribed via `turbo_stream_from @campaign`, broadcast `broadcast_replace_to` on create)
- [x] "Recent donations" list: donor name resolved per `display_preference` (e.g. "Yosef S." for first-name-only, "Anonymous" for anonymous), amount, dedication message when present, recurring badge — appended live via Turbo Stream when a new donation lands (`Donation#display_name`, `donations/_donation` partial, `broadcast_prepend_to` + placeholder removal via `broadcast_remove_to`)
- [x] **Tests**: system spec — two concurrent Capybara sessions; submitting the donation form in one broadcasts the updated raised amount and the new donation (with its `display_preference`-resolved name) to the other session live, with no reload
- [x] Commit + push

Assistant2026-06-08T11:44:10.563Z
$ Bash
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Broadcast live campaign updates via Turbo Streams on donation creation

Subscribes the campaign show page to its Turbo Stream (turbo_stream_from),
extracts the stats block into a campaigns/_stats partial that gets replaced
in place on every new donation, and appends new entries to the "Recent
donations" list (donations/_donation partial) live via broadcast_prepend_to,
removing the empty-state placeholder once the first one lands.

Adds Donation#display_name to resolve the donor's name for public display
per their chosen display_preference (full name / first name + initial /
anonymous), and a two-session system spec proving the updates reach other
viewers without a page reload.
EOF
)" && git push

Assistant2026-06-08T11:44:22.293Z

Section 7 is complete and pushed (triggers Render auto-deploy):

What was built: - Donation#display_name resolves donor names per display_preference (full name / "First L." / "תורם/ת אנונימי/ת") - Extracted campaigns/_stats partial (raised amount, progress bar, donor count) and donations/_donation partial (name, amount, dedication message, monthly badge) - turbo_stream_from @campaign subscription on the show page; DonationsController#create now broadcasts broadcast_replace_to (stats) and broadcast_prepend_to (new donation row, with placeholder removal) on success - New system spec using two concurrent Capybara sessions ("viewer" + "donor") proving updates reach other viewers live, with no reload — all 39 specs pass

TASKS.md Section 7 is checked off. Note: while testing I found docs/BUGFIXES.md had been recreated with real content ("donations list not presented in donations tab") — I left it in place and it's now committed since it documents exactly the bug this section fixed.

Next up per TASKS.md is Section 8 (styling pass / RTL check / responsive review) — let me know if you'd like me to continue there.

## 8. Styling pass
- [ ] RTL check across the page (`dir="rtl"`, Tailwind logical utilities `ms-`/`me-`/`ps-`/`pe-`/`rtl:`)
- [ ] Compare against the reference page; adjust spacing/color/type to "clearly resemble" without chasing pixel-perfection — note anything you deliberately changed and why (per the brief's invitation to improve things that strike you as off)
- [ ] Responsive check at mobile width for header, tabs, and modal
- [ ] **Tests**: none new — this is a visual pass; rerun the existing system specs to confirm styling changes haven't broken any selectors/assertions
- [ ] Commit + push

Tool reply2026-06-08T11:49:21.058Z
1	Backend Developer (Ruby on Rails) — Home Assignment
2	Overview
3	Build a small Rails app that reproduces a specific Jgive campaign donation page — the part a
4	donor sees and interacts with, up to (but not including) payment.
5	
6	Your reference is this live campaign: https://www.jgive.com/new/he/ils/donation-
7	targets/159183
8	
9	Aim to get the result close to the existing design — it doesn't need to be pixel-perfect, but it
10	should clearly resemble the original. If something in the current design strikes you as off, feel
11	free to improve it — just tell us what you changed and why.
12	Time
13	Aim for roughly 4–6 hours. We care far more about your judgment than about completeness. If
14	you run short, cut scope deliberately and tell us what you cut and why. Please don't polish
15	endlessly — a focused, well-reasoned submission beats a sprawling one.

```yaml
          - generic [ref=e14]:

        - button "לתרומה" [ref=e18]
    - generic [ref=e19]:

        - button "על הפרויקט" [ref=e21]

        - button "על העמותה" [ref=e25]
        - button "עדכונים" [ref=e26]
      - paragraph [ref=e29]: "הצטרפו עכשיו והיו ממקימי ׳הגן הכתום׳ — לזכר שירי, אריאל וכפיר ביבס, ולזכר כל ילדי ה-7 באוקטובר. אנחנו יוצאים לדרך עם הקמת הגן הכתום — מרחב ראשון מסוגו בישראל שמחבר זיכרון, טבע ילדים וריפוי. על פני 20 דונם יוקם מרחב חי של טבע, מים, משחק, משפחה וריפוי - פתוח לכולם. מקום שבו ילדים ירוצו וישחקו, משפחות יתכנסו יחד, ואנשים יוכלו לעצור לרגע, לנשום ולהתחבר מחדש. מקום שיכלול גם מרחב מכבד לזכר כל ילדי השבעה באוקטובר — כדי לזכור דרך החיים, האור והאהבה. הגן הכתום מוקם במגדל העמק, סמוך לגני הילדים \"אריאל\" ו\"כפיר\" הנבנים בימים אלה. בגן יוקמו מתחם גינון טיפולי-קהילתי, בוסתני פרי ומטעים, נחל אקולוגי, מרחב זיכרון לכל ילדי השבעה באוקטובר, אומגה כתומה ומתקני משחק, קיר משאלות, מרחבי פיקניק משפחתיים, אמפיתיאטרון וספרייה חיצונית. הפרויקט הוא יוזמה של עמותת ונטעת, בשיתוף משפחת ביבס, עיריית מגדל העמק ומשרד אדריכלי הנוף איזי בלנק. עיריית מגדל העמק העניקה את הקרקע והתחייבה לתחזוקה שוטפת — התוכניות מוכנות, ועכשיו זה תלוי בנו. כל תרומה תומכת ישירות בהקמת הגן: כל עץ, כל שביל, כל פינה שתוקם — יקרה רק בזכותכם."
```

<div class="mb-5 grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
  <div>
    <%= form.label :donor_name, "שם מלא", class: "mb-1 block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700" %>
    <%= form.text_field :donor_name, required: true,
          class: "w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-orange-500" %>
  </div>

    <%= form.label :donor_email, "אימייל", class: "mb-1 block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700" %>
    <%= form.email_field :donor_email, required: true,
          class: "w-full rounded-md border-gray-300 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-orange-500" %>
  </div>
</div>

Assistant2026-06-08T11:57:28.520Z

The donation amount is defined as a decimal(12,2) column on the donations table — schema.rb:39 (and donation_options.amount, schema.rb:29, for the preset amount tiles).

  • DB: db/migrate/..._create_donations.rb → t.decimal :amount, precision: 12, scale: 2
  • Model validation: app/models/donation.rb:9 → validates :amount, numericality: { greater_than: 0 }
  • Resolved in the controller: app/controllers/donations_controller.rb resolve_amount — picks either a selected preset tile's amount or the free-form "other amount" (custom_amount) field value

Let me continue checking the mobile tabs screenshot.

Assistant2026-06-08T11:58:53.711Z
✏️ Edit TASKS.md
/Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/docs/TASKS.md
−
## 8. Styling pass
- [ ] RTL check across the page (`dir="rtl"`, Tailwind logical utilities `ms-`/`me-`/`ps-`/`pe-`/`rtl:`)
- [ ] Compare against the reference page; adjust spacing/color/type to "clearly resemble" without chasing pixel-perfection — note anything you deliberately changed and why (per the brief's invitation to improve things that strike you as off)
- [ ] Responsive check at mobile width for header, tabs, and modal
- [ ] **Tests**: none new — this is a visual pass; rerun the existing system specs to confirm styling changes haven't broken any selectors/assertions
- [ ] Commit + push
+
## 8. Styling pass
- [x] RTL check across the page (`dir="rtl"`, Tailwind logical utilities `ms-`/`me-`/`ps-`/`pe-`/`rtl:`) — audited every view for physical-direction utilities (`ml-`/`mr-`/`pl-`/`pr-`/`text-left`/`text-right`); none found, the codebase already uses logical properties consistently
- [x] Compare against the reference page; adjust spacing/color/type to "clearly resemble" without chasing pixel-perfection — overall layout (cover image, title, progress bar, raised/goal amounts, donate button, tabs) already closely mirrors the reference. **Bug found & fixed**: donation form text inputs/textarea (`donor_name`, `donor_email`, `custom_amount`, `dedication_message`) were missing the `border` width utility — `border-gray-300` alone sets a color with no visible border, so fields looked borderless/floating. Added `border` alongside the color class in all four partials.
- [x] Responsive check at mobile width for header, tabs, and modal — checked at 390px: header stacks cleanly, tabs wrap to two rows without overlap, and the modal renders full-width and scrollable with all fields legible
- [x] **Tests**: none new — this is a visual pass; reran the existing system specs to confirm styling changes haven't broken any selectors/assertions (all green)
- [x] Commit + push

Assistant2026-06-08T11:59:03.784Z
$ Bash
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix invisible borders on donation form text inputs (styling pass)

Section 8: compared the live page against the jgive.com reference and
checked RTL/responsive behavior. Layout already closely mirrors the
reference and consistently uses logical Tailwind utilities (no ml-/mr-/
pl-/pr- found). One real bug surfaced: donor_name, donor_email,
custom_amount, and dedication_message fields used `border-gray-300`
(a color) without the `border` width utility, so they rendered with no
visible border at all. Added `border` to all four.
EOF
)" && git push
Tool reply2026-06-08T11:59:05.438Z
a32f7bd Fix invisible borders on donation form text inputs (styling pass)
4 files changed, 9 insertions(+), 9 deletions(-)
To https://github.com/yosefsha/jgivehome.git
   ff6d46d..a32f7bd  main -> main
Assistant2026-06-08T11:59:15.120Z

Section 8 done and pushed. Summary of the styling pass:

  • RTL audit: scanned all views for physical-direction utilities (ml-/mr-/pl-/pr-/text-left/text-right) — found none; the codebase already consistently uses logical properties (me-, ms-, gap-) and dir="rtl".
  • Reference comparison: the live page (cover image, title, progress bar, raised/goal amounts, donate button, tabs) already closely mirrors jgive.com's layout. Found and fixed a real bug along the way: the donation form's text inputs/textarea (donor_name, donor_email, custom amount, dedication message) had border-gray-300 without the border width utility, so Tailwind rendered them with no visible border at all — they looked like floating text with no input box. Added border to all four fields.
  • Mobile check (390px): header stacks cleanly, tabs wrap into two rows without overlap, modal is full-width and scrollable with all fields legible.
  • All system specs still green (6/6).

TASKS.md Section 8 is checked off. Next up is Section 9 (README) — let me know if you'd like me to continue.

156	            - img [ref=e139]
157	            - img [ref=e143]
158	          - list [ref=e144]:
159	            - listitem [ref=e145] [cursor=pointer]:
160	              - button "• 1" [ref=e146]
161	            - listitem [ref=e147] [cursor=pointer]:
162	              - button "• 2" [ref=e148]
163	            - listitem [ref=e149] [cursor=pointer]:
164	              - button "• 3" [ref=e150]
165	        - generic [ref=e151]:
166	          - generic [ref=e152]:
167	            - heading "הגן הכתום" [level=3] [ref=e153]
168	            - paragraph [ref=e154]: לזכר בני משפחת ביבס וילדי ה-7 באוקטובר
169	          - generic [ref=e156]:
170	            - generic [ref=e157]:
171	              - generic [ref=e158]: ‏995,973 ‏₪
172	              - generic [ref=e160]: 20% גויסו
173	            - img [ref=e162]
174	            - generic [ref=e163]:
175	              - generic [ref=e165]:
176	                - text: "מספר תורמים:"
177	                - generic [ref=e166]: 3,187
178	              - generic [ref=e168]: "יעד: ‏5,000,000 ‏₪"
179	          - generic [ref=e170]:
180	            - generic [ref=e172]:
181	              - button "bit logo" [ref=e173] [cursor=pointer]:
182	                - img "bit logo" [ref=e174]
183	              - button "לתרומה" [ref=e176] [cursor=pointer]
184	              - generic [ref=e177]:
185	                - generic [ref=e178]: "תרומה מוכרת לזיכוי מס:"
186	                - generic [ref=e179]:
187	                  - img [ref=e181]
188	                  - img [ref=e187]
189	                  - img [ref=e198]
190	                  - img [ref=e206]
191	                - button [ref=e216] [cursor=pointer]:
192	                  - button [ref=e217]:
193	                    - img [ref=e218]
194	            - generic [ref=e221]:
195	              - button "העתקת קישור" [ref=e223] [cursor=pointer]:
196	                - img "העתקת קישור" [ref=e224]
197	              - button [ref=e226] [cursor=pointer]:
198	                - img [ref=e227]
199	              - button [ref=e229] [cursor=pointer]:
200	                - img [ref=e230]
201	              - button [ref=e232] [cursor=pointer]:
202	                - img [ref=e233]
203	      - generic [ref=e235]:
204	        - generic [ref=e237]:
205	          - button "Scroll right" [ref=e238] [cursor=pointer]:
206	            - img [ref=e239]
207	          - generic [ref=e241]:
208	            - button "על הפרויקט" [ref=e242] [cursor=pointer]
209	            - button "תרומות אחרונות" [ref=e243] [cursor=pointer]
210	            - button "לוח שגרירים" [ref=e244] [cursor=pointer]
211	            - button "קבוצות" [ref=e245] [cursor=pointer]
212	            - button "על העמותה" [ref=e246] [cursor=pointer]
213	            - button "עדכונים" [ref=e247] [cursor=pointer]
214	        - generic [ref=e249]:
215	          - heading "על הפרויקט" [level=4] [ref=e250]
216	          - generic [ref=e251]:
217	            - heading "הצטרפו עכשיו והיו ממקימי ׳הגן הכתום׳" [level=2] [ref=e252]
218	            - heading "לזכר שירי, אריאל וכפיר ביבס, ולזכר כל ילדי ה-7 באוקטובר." [level=3] [ref=e253]:
219	              - strong [ref=e254]:
220	                - text: לזכר שירי, אריאל וכפיר ביבס,
221	                - text: ולזכר כל ילדי ה-7 באוקטובר.
222	            - paragraph
223	            - paragraph [ref=e255]:
224	              - text: אחרי שנתיים וחצי של כאב, טלטלה והתמודדות,
225	              - text: מגיע מיזם שמביא בשורה חדשה לישראל -
226	              - strong [ref=e256]: מקום של חיים, ריפוי ותקווה.
227	            - paragraph [ref=e257]:
228	              - text: אנחנו יוצאים לדרך עם הקמת
229	              - strong [ref=e258]: הגן הכתום
230	              - text: "-"
231	              - text: מרחב ראשון מסוגו בישראל שמחבר זיכרון, טבע ילדים וריפוי.
232	            - paragraph [ref=e259]:
233	              - text: על פני
234	              - strong [ref=e260]: 20 דונם
235	              - text: יוקם מרחב חי של טבע, מים, משחק, משפחה וריפוי - פתוח לכולם.
236	            - paragraph [ref=e261]:
237	              - text: מקום שבו ילדים ירוצו וישחקו,
238	              - text: משפחות יתכנסו יחד,
239	              - text: ואנשים יוכלו לעצור לרגע, לנשום ולהתחבר מחדש.
240	            - paragraph [ref=e262]:
241	              - text: מקום שיכלול גם מרחב מכבד לזכר כל ילדי השבעה באוקטובר -
242	              - text: כדי לזכור דרך החיים, האור והאהבה.
243	            - heading "למען כל ילדי ישראל 🧡 למען התיקון של כולנו." [level=3] [ref=e263]:
244	              - text: למען כל ילדי ישראל 🧡
245	              - text: למען התיקון של כולנו.
246	            - paragraph
247	            - paragraph [ref=e264]:
248	              - text: כדי שהגן יממש את מלוא הפוטנציאל שלו -
249	              - text: אנחנו זקוקים לכם, אזרחי ישראל.
250	            - figure [ref=e265]:
251	              - img [ref=e266]
252	            - paragraph [ref=e267]: "השטח כיום, ומה שהוא יהפוך להיות - תכנון: איזי בלנק אדריכלי נוף"
253	            - paragraph
254	            - heading "מה יחכה לנו בגן הכתום?" [level=3] [ref=e268]
255	            - paragraph [ref=e269]:
256	              - strong [ref=e270]: הגן הכתום מוקם במגדל העמק
257	              - text: ", סמוך לגני הילדים \"אריאל\" ו\"כפיר\" הנבנים בימים אלה."
258	              - text: גן שכל משפחה בישראל תוכל להגיע אליו, לנשום, להתחבר, לזכור - ולהרגיש שכולנו יחד בונים משהו חדש.
259	            - paragraph
260	            - paragraph [ref=e271]: "בגן הכתום יוקם מרחב חדשני וראשון מסוגו בישראל, שישלב בין טבע, משחק, ריפוי וזיכרון:"
261	            - paragraph [ref=e272]:
262	              - text: 🌿
263	              - strong [ref=e273]: מתחם גינון טיפולי-קהילתי
264	              - text: מרחב ריפוי דרך הטבע והאדמה עבור הלומי קרב, בני הגיל השלישי, אנשים עם צרכים מיוחדים, נוער בסיכון וקהילות הזקוקות לצמיחה מחדש.
265	            - paragraph [ref=e274]:
266	              - text: 🍊
267	              - strong [ref=e275]: בוסתני פרי ומטעים
268	              - text: הליכה בין עצי פרי, ריחות וצמחייה, בהשראת הפירות ששירי ואריאל אהבו.
269	            - paragraph [ref=e276]:
270	              - text: 💧
271	              - strong [ref=e277]: הנחל האקולוגי
272	              - text: נחל זורם המלווה את המבקרים לאורך הגן, עם גשרי עץ קטנים, מים חיים וחוויית הליכה מרגיעה.
273	            - paragraph [ref=e278]:
274	              - text: 🌱
275	              - strong [ref=e279]: מרחב זיכרון לכל ילדי השבעה באוקטובר
276	              - text: פינה מכבדת ומלאת אור, לזכר הילדים שנלקחו מעולמנו.
277	            - paragraph [ref=e280]:
278	              - text: 🧡
279	              - strong [ref=e281]: האומגה הכתומה ומתקני המשחק
280	              - text: כי צחוק של ילדים הוא התשובה הכי חזקה לכאב.
281	            - paragraph [ref=e282]:
282	              - text: 🌟
283	              - strong [ref=e283]: קיר המשאלות
284	              - text: מקום שבו כל ילד וילדה בישראל יוכלו להשאיר משאלה, תפילה, תקווה או חלום.
285	            - paragraph [ref=e284]:
286	              - text: 👨‍👩‍👧
287	              - strong [ref=e285]: מרחבי פיקניק משפחתיים
288	              - text: פינות מפגש ירוקות ומזמינות, ליצירת זיכרונות חדשים תחת כיפת השמיים.
289	            - paragraph [ref=e286]:
290	              - text: 🎭
291	              - strong [ref=e287]: אמפיתיאטרון, כיתות חוץ ומרחבי תרבות
292	              - text: מקום למפגשים, הופעות, פעילות חינוכית וקהילתית.
293	            - paragraph [ref=e288]:
294	              - text: 📚
295	              - strong [ref=e289]: ספריית חוץ ומרחב השראה
296	              - text: פינות ישיבה מוצלות עם ספרי ילדים, שולחנות יצירה ומקום לדמיון לצמוח.
297	            - paragraph
298	            - paragraph [ref=e290]: וזה רק חלק ממה שמתוכנן.
299	            - paragraph [ref=e291]:
300	              - text: הגן כולו ישלב מים, טרסות חקלאיות, שבילי הליכה, מרחבי משחק טבעיים, מטעים ופינות משפחה -
301	              - text: חוויית הליכה בתוך נוף ארץ ישראלי חי ומרפא.
302	            - paragraph [ref=e292]: זה יהיה מקום שבו עם שלם יוכל להגיע, לגעת באדמה, לנשום מחדש ולהרגיש שיש גם אור אחרי השבר.
303	            - heading "זהו פרויקט לאומי של אהבה, אחריות ותקווה. ההזדמנות שלנו להשאיר חותם לדורות." [level=3] [ref=e293]:
304	              - strong [ref=e294]: זהו פרויקט לאומי של אהבה, אחריות ותקווה.
305	              - strong [ref=e295]: ההזדמנות שלנו להשאיר חותם לדורות.
306	            - paragraph
307	            - paragraph [ref=e296]:
308	              - text: הפרויקט הוא יוזמה של עמותת
309	              - strong [ref=e297]: ונטעת
310	              - text: ", בשיתוף משפחת ביבס, עיריית מגדל העמק ובתכנון משרד אדריכלי הנוף איזי בלנק."
311	            - figure [ref=e298]:
312	              - img [ref=e299]
313	            - heading "השטח כבר מחכה. עכשיו זה תלוי בנו." [level=3] [ref=e300]
314	            - paragraph [ref=e301]:
315	              - text: עיריית מגדל העמק העניקה את הקרקע והתחייבה לתחזוקה שוטפת.
316	              - text: התוכניות מוכנות.
317	              - generic [ref=e302]: עכשיו אנחנו צריכים אתכם כדי להפוך את האדמה הזו לגן של חיים.
318	              - generic [ref=e303]: "כל תרומה תומכת ישירות בהקמת הגן:"
319	              - text: כל עץ, כל שביל, כל פינה שתוקם - יקרה רק בזכותכם.
320	              - text: בואו נבנה יחד מקום בו הכאב הופך לריפוי של מדינה שלמה.
321	            - heading "תרמו עכשיו והיו שותפים בהקמת הגן." [level=3] [ref=e304]:
322	              - strong [ref=e305]: תרמו עכשיו והיו שותפים בהקמת הגן.
323	            - heading "לזכרם - למען כולנו 🧡" [level=3] [ref=e306]
324	            - paragraph
325	            - figure [ref=e307]:
326	              - img [ref=e308]
327	            - heading "״ראינו את התכניות של הגן, ופשוט התחלנו לבכות״" [level=3] [ref=e309]
328	            - paragraph [ref=e310]:
329	              - text: כשעופרי ביבס ראתה לראשונה את התוכנית של הגן,
330	              - text: היא לא הצליחה לעצור את הדמעות.
331	              - text: "עופרי דיברה על מה שמזכיר לה הכי הרבה את שירי והילדים:"
332	              - text: פיקניקים של שבת.
333	              - text: משפחה שיושבת יחד.
334	              - text: ועל תמונה אחת שהיא לא מפסיקה לדמיין -
335	              - text: אריאל מתרוצץ בין העצים,
336	              - text: רץ למים, מטפס, נהנה מכל מה שהגן מציע.
337	            - paragraph [ref=e311]:
338	              - strong [ref=e312]:
339	                - text: יש חלומות שלא יתגשמו עבורם.
340	                - text: אבל אנחנו יכולים להגשים אותם דרך ילדי ישראל והדורות הבאים
341	              - text: 🧡
342	            - figure [ref=e313]:
343	              - img [ref=e314]
344	            - paragraph [ref=e315]: שירי ואריאל ביבס עם עופרי ביבס ובנה. מצד שמאל - ״קיר המשאלות״ בו כל ילד יוכל לבקש את משאלת ליבו
345	            - paragraph
346	            - paragraph [ref=e316]: "עמותת וְנָטַעְתָּ, מובילת הפרויקט, היא תנועה לאומית - סביבתית לריפוי החברה הישראלית דרך הטבע וחיבור לאדמה. העמותה מקימה מאות גינות טיפוליות במוסדות שיקום, חינוך ורווחה ונוטעת אלפי עצים ברחבי הארץ. מאז ה-7 באוקטובר, העמותה יצאה לדרך עם פרויקט ״אדמות ברכה״ להקמת מאות מרחבי ריפוי קהילתיים דרך הטבע ביישובי העוטף, הצפון ובלב קהילות שבנפגעו במלחמה. העמותה פועלת במודל: אדם - אדמה - קהילה - כל הפרויקטים תמיד מחברים בין בין אדם לאדם ובין אדם לאדמה. מתוך ידיעה והבנה עמוקה, שריפוי אדם במשבר, קשור באופן ישיר לריפוי ושיקום הקהילה והסביבה שהוא חלק ממנה."
347	            - paragraph [ref=e317]: העמותה זוכת Israel Earth Prize לשנת 2023, עבור השפעתה החיובית על הסביבה וחברה בישראל.
348	            - paragraph [ref=e318]: פרויקט ׳הגן הכתום׳ מתקיים בשיתוף פעולה מלא עם עיריית מגדל העמק ומשפחת ביבס.
349	            - paragraph [ref=e319]: "לתמיכה של חברות וארגונים יש ליצור קשר: 054-2370949, דוריאל רימר, מנכ״לית עמותת ונטעת"
350	            - paragraph
351	          - generic [ref=e320]:
352	            - generic [ref=e321]:
353	              - generic [ref=e322]:
354	                - heading "ליצירת קשר עם העמותה:" [level=6] [ref=e323]
355	                - generic [ref=e324]:
356	                  - generic [ref=e325]: אי-מייל
357	                  - generic [ref=e326]: info@venatata.org

370	                - paragraph [ref=e338]: תרומות לפרויקט זה יתכן ויהיו מוכרות לצורכי מס בישראל, בארה"ב, בקנדה ובאנגליה, בהתאם לתנאי השימוש של האתר. כל המלצת תורם חייבת לעמוד במטרות הנתמכות של הארגון ועשויות להיות מנותבות מחדש בהתאם למדיניות שלנו ולתנאי השימוש.

28	      <% if notice %>
29	        <p dir="rtl" class="mb-4 rounded-md border border-green-200 bg-green-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-green-800" data-turbo-cache="false">
30	          <%= notice %>
31	        </p>
32	      <% end %>
33	      <% if alert %>
34	        <p dir="rtl" class="mb-4 rounded-md border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-red-800" data-turbo-cache="false">
35	          <%= alert %>
36	        </p>
37	      <% end %>
38	
39	      <%= yield %>
40	    </main>
41	  </body>

# This file is auto-generated from the current state of the database. Instead
# of editing this file, please use the migrations feature of Active Record to
# incrementally modify your database, and then regenerate this schema definition.
#
# This file is the source Rails uses to define your schema when running `bin/rails
# db:schema:load`. When creating a new database, `bin/rails db:schema:load` tends to
# be faster and is potentially less error prone than running all of your
# migrations from scratch. Old migrations may fail to apply correctly if those
# migrations use external dependencies or application code.
#
# It's strongly recommended that you check this file into your version control system.

ActiveRecord::Schema[8.1].define(version: 2026_06_08_095214) do
  # These are extensions that must be enabled in order to support this database
  enable_extension "pg_catalog.plpgsql"

  create_table "campaigns", force: :cascade do |t|
    t.string "cover_image_url"
    t.datetime "created_at", null: false
    t.decimal "goal_amount", precision: 12, scale: 2
    t.string "slug"
    t.text "story"
    t.string "title"
    t.datetime "updated_at", null: false
    t.index ["slug"], name: "index_campaigns_on_slug", unique: true

Now let's add the seed value and a helper to derive the YouTube embed URL:

✏️ Edit seeds.rb

end
+
orange_garden = Campaign.find_or_create_by!(slug: "orange-garden") do |campaign|
  campaign.title = "הגן הכתום"
  campaign.story = orange_garden_story
  campaign.cover_image_url = "/images/background_orange.jpg"
  campaign.video_url = "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4Z_xXXR3ddU"
  campaign.goal_amount = 5_000_000
end

Tool reply2026-06-08T12:16:21.550Z
1	class Campaign < ApplicationRecord
2	  has_many :donation_options, dependent: :destroy
3	  has_many :donations, dependent: :destroy
4	
5	  validates :title, :story, :goal_amount, :slug, presence: true
6	  validates :slug, uniqueness: true
7	  validates :goal_amount, numericality: { greater_than: 0 }
8	
9	  # Makes url helpers (campaign_path(campaign), new_campaign_donation_path(campaign), ...)
10	  # build slug-based URLs instead of falling back to the numeric id.
11	  def to_param
12	    slug
13	  end
14	
15	  # Pending donations count toward progress: this demo has no payment
16	  # integration to ever flip them to "paid", so excluding pending would mean
17	  # the progress bar never visibly moves after a donation is submitted.
18	  # See README for the full rationale.
19	  def raised_amount
20	    donations.where(status: [ :pending, :paid ]).sum(:amount)
21	  end
22	
23	  def progress_percentage
24	    return 0 if goal_amount.zero?
25	
26	    (raised_amount / goal_amount * 100).round(1)
27	  end
28	end
29
Assistant2026-06-08T12:16:28.930Z
✏️ Edit campaign.rb
/Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/app/models/campaign.rb
−
  def progress_percentage
    return 0 if goal_amount.zero?

    (raised_amount / goal_amount * 100).round(1)
  end
end
+
  def progress_percentage
    return 0 if goal_amount.zero?

    (raised_amount / goal_amount * 100).round(1)
  end

  # Converts a regular YouTube watch/share URL (as it'd be pasted by a
  # campaign admin) into the `/embed/` form an <iframe> can render, so the
  # banner can show the campaign's video the way the reference page does.
  def video_embed_url
    return nil if video_url.blank?

    match = video_url.match(%r{(?:youtu\.be/|youtube\.com/watch\?v=)([\w-]+)})
    return nil unless match

    "https://www.youtube.com/embed/#{match[1]}"
  end
end
Tool reply2026-06-08T12:16:28.971Z
The file /Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/app/models/campaign.rb has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

1	<div dir="rtl" class="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
2	  <%= turbo_stream_from @campaign %>
3	
4	  <div class="rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow">
5	    <img src="<%= @campaign.cover_image_url %>" alt="<%= @campaign.title %>" class="w-full h-64 object-cover">
6	
7	    <div class="bg-white p-6">
8	      <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900"><%= @campaign.title %></h1>
9	
10	      <%= render "stats", campaign: @campaign %>
11	
12	      <div class="mt-6" data-controller="modal">
13	        <button type="button"
14	                data-action="modal#open"
15	                data-modal-src-param="<%= new_campaign_donation_path(@campaign) %>"
16	                class="px-6 py-3 rounded-md bg-orange-500 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-orange-600">
17	          לתרומה
18	        </button>
19	
20	        <dialog data-modal-target="dialog"
21	                data-action="click->modal#closeBackground"
22	                class="w-full max-w-lg rounded-lg p-0 backdrop:bg-black/50">
23	          <%= turbo_frame_tag "donation_modal", data: { modal_target: "frame" } %>
24	        </dialog>
25	      </div>
26	    </div>
27	  </div>
28	
29	  <% tabs = [
30	       { name: "about_project", label: "על הפרויקט" },

36	     ] %>

+
  <div class="rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow">
    <div class="relative">
      <img src="<%= @campaign.cover_image_url %>" alt="<%= @campaign.title %>" class="w-full h-64 object-cover">

      <% if @campaign.video_embed_url.present? %>
        <div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/30">
          <div class="aspect-video w-full max-w-md overflow-hidden rounded-lg shadow-lg">
            <iframe class="h-full w-full" src="<%= @campaign.video_embed_url %>"
                    title="<%= @campaign.title %> — סרטון הקמפיין"
                    allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
                    allowfullscreen></iframe>
          </div>
        </div>
      <% end %>
    </div>

    <div class="bg-white p-6">

                data-action="click->modal#closeBackground"

        <button type="button"
                data-action="modal#open"
                data-modal-src-param="<%= new_campaign_donation_path(@campaign) %>"
                class="w-full sm:w-auto px-6 py-3 rounded-md bg-orange-500 text-white font-semibold hover:bg-orange-600">
          לתרומה
        </button>
        <p class="mt-3 text-xs text-gray-500">תרומה לקמפיין זה מוכרת לזיכוי מס</p>

        <dialog data-modal-target="dialog"
                data-action="click->modal#closeBackground"
                class="w-full max-w-lg rounded-lg p-0 backdrop:bg-black/50">
          <%= turbo_frame_tag "donation_modal", data: { modal_target: "frame" } %>
        </dialog>

Addressed: added a fixed nav bar (`layouts/application.html.erb`), embedded the
campaign's YouTube video centered over the cover image in the banner
(`Campaign#video_embed_url` derives the `/embed/` URL from a stored
`video_url`, seeded for הגן הכתום with the linked video), and grouped the
donate button into a bordered "donation menu" card with a tax-credit note,
closer to the reference's bit/donate/tax-info grouping.

Assistant2026-06-08T12:19:43.802Z
$ Bash
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add nav bar, embedded campaign video, and donation menu grouping

Per feedback comparing against the jgive.com reference: the page lacked a
nav bar, the campaign banner had no video (the reference embeds one front
and center), and the donate button felt disconnected from supporting info.

- Add a fixed nav bar to the layout, giving the page the nav/main split
  the reference has
- Add Campaign#video_url + #video_embed_url (parses watch/share URLs into
  embeddable /embed/ form) and embed it centered over the cover image in
  the banner; seeded for הגן הכתום with its real YouTube video
- Group the donate button and a tax-credit note into a bordered "donation
  menu" card, echoing the reference's bit/donate/tax-info grouping
EOF
)" && git push

Assistant2026-06-08T12:20:09.157Z

Pushed and all 39 specs pass (this triggers Render's auto-deploy with the migration). Summary of changes addressing your feedback:

  • Nav bar: added a fixed top nav bar to the layout (Jgivehome brand link), giving the page the nav/main split the reference has
  • Campaign video: added Campaign#video_url (migration + seed for הגן הכתום with the YouTube link you provided) and #video_embed_url to convert it to an embeddable form; the video now plays centered over the cover image in the banner, similar to the reference's video player placement
  • Donation menu: grouped the donate button with a tax-credit note into a bordered card, echoing the reference's bit/donate/tax-info grouping

Marked the BUGFIXES.md item as resolved with a note on what was changed and how. Remote should redeploy automatically (the migration runs on boot per the existing db:migrate wiring).

    <header dir="rtl" class="fixed inset-x-0 top-0 z-10 border-b border-gray-200 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur">
      <nav class="container mx-auto flex items-center justify-between gap-4 px-5 py-3">
        <div class="flex items-center gap-6">
          <%= link_to "Jgivehome", root_path, class: "text-lg font-bold text-orange-600" %>

          <%# Stubs: mirror the reference site's menu structure; destinations are out of scope for this assignment. %>
          <ul class="hidden items-center gap-1 sm:flex">
            <% [ "פתרונות", "מוצרים", "עלינו" ].each do |label| %>
              <li>
                <a href="#" class="flex items-center gap-1 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 hover:text-orange-600">
                  <%= label %>
                  <span aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
                </a>
              </li>
            <% end %>
          </ul>
        </div>

        <ul class="flex items-center gap-1">
          <li>
            <a href="#" aria-label="חיפוש" class="rounded-full p-2 text-gray-500 hover:text-orange-600">
              <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
                <path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M7.439 2.609a8 8 0 019.38 12.296l5.388 5.388a1 1 0 01-1.414 1.414l-5.388-5.387A8 8 0 117.44 2.609zM10.5 4a6 6 0 100 12 6 6 0 000-12z"/>
              </svg>
            </a>
          </li>
          <li class="hidden sm:block">
            <a href="#" class="rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 hover:text-orange-600">תמיכה</a>
          </li>
          <li class="hidden sm:block">
            <a href="#" class="rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 hover:text-orange-600">HE | ILS</a>
          </li>
          <li>
            <a href="#" class="rounded-md bg-orange-500 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white hover:bg-orange-600">לתרומה</a>
          </li>
          <li class="hidden sm:block">
            <a href="#" class="rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:border-orange-500 hover:text-orange-600">התחברות</a>
          </li>
        </ul>
      </nav>
    </header>

Assistant2026-06-08T12:32:08.025Z

Let's create a reusable banner component that takes a background image and a centered video link:

Assistant2026-06-08T12:32:13.201Z
📝 Write _media_banner.html.erb
/Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/app/views/campaigns/_media_banner.html.erb
<%# Wide background image with an optional centered "watch the video" link —
    reused for any campaign that has a cover image and a YouTube video,
    mirroring how the reference page fronts its banner with a video. %>
<div class="relative">
  <img src="<%= image_url %>" alt="<%= image_alt %>" class="w-full h-64 object-cover">

  <% if video_url.present? %>
    <%= link_to video_url, target: "_blank", rel: "noopener noreferrer",
          class: "group absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/20 transition hover:bg-black/30" do %>
      <span class="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-full bg-white/90 px-5 py-3 shadow-lg transition group-hover:scale-105">
        <span class="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-orange-500 text-white">
          <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" class="-ms-0.5">
            <path d="M8 5v14l11-7z"/>
          </svg>
        </span>
        <span class="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-800">צפו בסרטון הקמפיין</span>
      </span>
    <% end %>
  <% end %>
</div>
Tool reply2026-06-08T12:32:13.242Z
File created successfully at: /Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/app/views/campaigns/_media_banner.html.erb (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

It's now unused — let's remove it since we're linking out to YouTube directly rather than embedding an iframe player.

Assistant2026-06-08T12:32:32.152Z
⚙ Read
{
  "file_path": "/Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/app/models/campaign.rb"
}
Tool reply2026-06-08T12:32:32.180Z
1	class Campaign < ApplicationRecord
2	  has_many :donation_options, dependent: :destroy
3	  has_many :donations, dependent: :destroy
4	
5	  validates :title, :story, :goal_amount, :slug, presence: true
6	  validates :slug, uniqueness: true
7	  validates :goal_amount, numericality: { greater_than: 0 }
8	
9	  # Makes url helpers (campaign_path(campaign), new_campaign_donation_path(campaign), ...)
10	  # build slug-based URLs instead of falling back to the numeric id.
11	  def to_param
12	    slug
13	  end
14	
15	  # Pending donations count toward progress: this demo has no payment
16	  # integration to ever flip them to "paid", so excluding pending would mean
17	  # the progress bar never visibly moves after a donation is submitted.
18	  # See README for the full rationale.
19	  def raised_amount
20	    donations.where(status: [ :pending, :paid ]).sum(:amount)
21	  end
22	
23	  def progress_percentage
24	    return 0 if goal_amount.zero?
25	
26	    (raised_amount / goal_amount * 100).round(1)
27	  end
28	
29	  # Converts a regular YouTube watch/share URL (as it'd be pasted by a
30	  # campaign admin) into the `/embed/` form an <iframe> can render, so the
31	  # banner can show the campaign's video the way the reference page does.
32	  def video_embed_url
33	    return nil if video_url.blank?
34	
35	    match = video_url.match(%r{(?:youtu\.be/|youtube\.com/watch\?v=)([\w-]+)})
36	    return nil unless match
37	
38	    "https://www.youtube.com/embed/#{match[1]}"
39	  end
40	end
41
Assistant2026-06-08T12:32:39.692Z
✏️ Edit campaign.rb
/Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/app/models/campaign.rb
−
  # Converts a regular YouTube watch/share URL (as it'd be pasted by a
  # campaign admin) into the `/embed/` form an <iframe> can render, so the
  # banner can show the campaign's video the way the reference page does.
  def video_embed_url
    return nil if video_url.blank?

    match = video_url.match(%r{(?:youtu\.be/|youtube\.com/watch\?v=)([\w-]+)})
    return nil unless match

    "https://www.youtube.com/embed/#{match[1]}"
  end
end
+
end

```js
})(page);
```

{

Tool reply2026-06-08T12:33:20.661Z
### Result
"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4Z_xXXR3ddU | target=_blank"
### Ran Playwright code
```js
await (async (page) => {
  const link = page.getByRole('link', { name: /צפו בסרטון/ });
  return await link.getAttribute('href') + ' | target=' + await link.getAttribute('target');
})(page);
```

Assistant2026-06-08T12:33:41.904Z
✏️ Edit BUGFIXES.md
/Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/docs/BUGFIXES.md
−
Addressed: added a fixed nav bar (`layouts/application.html.erb`), embedded the
campaign's YouTube video centered over the cover image in the banner
(`Campaign#video_embed_url` derives the `/embed/` URL from a stored
`video_url`, seeded for הגן הכתום with the linked video), and grouped the
donate button into a bordered "donation menu" card with a tax-credit note,

+
Addressed: added a fixed nav bar (`layouts/application.html.erb`), and grouped
the donate button into a bordered "donation menu" card with a tax-credit
note, closer to the reference's bit/donate/tax-info grouping.

Banner video — superseded the initial iframe-embed approach with a reusable
`campaigns/_media_banner` component: a wide background image with a centered
"watch the video" link/button (play icon + label) that opens the campaign's
YouTube video in a new tab. Simpler, avoids iframe-loading/CSP overhead, and
reads more like "a link to a video" than an autoplay-prone embedded player.
`Campaign#video_url` is stored on the model and seeded for הגן הכתום with the
linked video; the component takes `image_url`/`image_alt`/`video_url` so it
can be reused for any campaign banner.
Tool reply2026-06-08T12:33:41.943Z
The file /Users/yosefshachnovsky/dev/jgivehome/docs/BUGFIXES.md has been updated successfully. (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)
Assistant2026-06-08T12:33:48.055Z
$ Bash
git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Replace iframe video embed with reusable media-banner link component

The campaign banner now uses campaigns/_media_banner: a wide background
image with a centered "watch the video" link (play icon + label) that opens
the campaign's YouTube video in a new tab, instead of an embedded iframe
player. This reads more like the requested "link to a video centered on a
background image," is reusable across any campaign with image_url/video_url
locals, and avoids iframe loading/CSP overhead.

Removed the now-unused Campaign#video_embed_url helper.
EOF
)" && git push
Tool reply2026-06-08T12:33:49.861Z

Assistant2026-06-08T12:33:57.411Z

Pushed. Summary:

  • New reusable component: app/views/campaigns/_media_banner.html.erb — takes image_url, image_alt, video_url and renders a wide background image with a centered "צפו בסרטון הקמפיין" (watch the campaign video) link, complete with a play-button icon, that opens the video in a new tab on hover/click
  • Replaced the previous iframe-embed approach (which was heavier and more autoplay-prone) with this simpler, reusable link-based design
  • Removed the now-unused Campaign#video_embed_url helper
  • Verified the link correctly points to https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4Z_xXXR3ddU with target="_blank", and all system specs pass (6/6)

Render should auto-deploy this now.
